name: Bumble Inc.
description: Bumble Inc. provides online dating and social networking applications worldwide. The company operates Bumble, a dating app where women make the first move; Badoo, a web and mobile-based dating platform; and Fruitz, a French dating app. It also offers Bumble BFF for platonic friendships and Bumble Bizz for professional networking. Bumble Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
